ux_or_integration.preflight_findings: Existing /design-system page is iOS-narration-heavy. User chose two-part layout (iOS story preserved + website showcase added below). 12 .figma.tsx files exist; motion/elevation/z-index tokens missing from @theme; figma.config.json present. /design preflight: MCP live, library accessible, Code Connect publish blocked but does not gate this feature. /design build folded into Phase 4. No blocking inconsistencies.

eval_results.non_ai_justification: Feature does not touch AIOrchestrator, ReadinessEngine, NutritionRecommender, TrainingRecommender, CohortIntelligence, or ai-engine/. Per v6.0 Eval Coverage Gate Protocol: non-AI features auto-pass.

review.ux_pre_merge_review: PASS (in-session heuristic): ux-spec.md §2 page structure matches shipped Part 2; §3 ComponentCard layout matches; §4 tokens match (motion 120/200/320ms, easings, 4 elevations Light+Dark, 5 z-index tiers); §5 a11y patterns honored (focus rings, 44pt touch on PersonaIndicator close, reduced-motion blanket from globals.css); §11 dark-mode preview uses .not-dark / .dark scope-down (verified in ComponentCard); §13 NOT-in-scope items (Storybook, multi-lang, accessibility-tester widget) confirmed deferred.
review.design_pre_merge_review: PASS (in-session heuristic): state.json.figma_node_ids populated with 22 node IDs across 17 .figma.tsx mappings; npm run build passes; figma-drift reports 0 findings; ParitySummaryCard shows 100% public parity. Figma frames created via use_figma MCP — 5 stub COMPONENTs (10:7, 10:13, 11:7, 11:11, 11:15) plus 15 variables (8:2-8:16). PR descriptions will reference these node IDs once PRs open. Scope revision (Internal-deferral) explicitly documented in cross-references.md §3 + tasks.md Bucket C entry.

metrics.kill_criteria: Drift between Figma file and code repeatedly exceeds 10% within 30 days of a build pass (i.e., maintenance burden outpaces value) OR public /design-system showcase route adds > 200ms to LCP on the homepage navigation flow
